title: 有馬記念の後に・チケゾーコール

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's burning resolve to win ends in
her claiming victory at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she tells her precious friends that
she hopes to have many more passion-filled races
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two rivals accept, asserting that they don't
intend to lose. Winning Ticket is overjoyed at the
idea of racing with them again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, she notices the increasing cheers of
"Tickezo" coming from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shouting words of gratitude, she smiles with a
light that brightens the entire track.
